entry.title: GoalOS Validation Authority V28 — Human or AGI Node
entry.description: Choose Human, AGI Node, or Hybrid validation for public-safe proof missions. Generates validation certificate, attestation, reviewer brief, and action graph.
entry.boundary: No user data, no user funds, no wallet, no transaction, no external call, no production authority.
